text: "A Messege To Br Sneako & Dr. Zakir Naik. May Allah Guide Them

"Shaykh Sulaymn al-Ruayl about X

Just a few minutes ago at the end of our lesson with the Shaykh in Masjid Nabaw, he said:

The default regarding the X platform is that what is shared on it is unreliable and false, unless proven otherwise."

"The devil-hearted ruler... 

There are many wicked Khariji Muslims who deliberately twist the narrations regarding the obedience to rulers. Or, they cite the ones that they allege support their revolutionary tendencies and ignore the ones which expose them and their lies. 

Be careful of these people. 

If you live in Muslim country that has a Muslim ruler, then listen and obey in that which is good and don't obey him in disobedience. 

Don't speak ill of him in public and don't advise him from pulpits.

Make Duaa for him and not against him. 

Don't incite the masses against him and call for revolts and corruption. 

If you live among the Kuffaar, then remain silent as you have no right to discuss our affairs nor is there any weight for the opinion of a hypocrite who pays taxes to the Kuffaar, pledges allegiance to them and helps them in their evil ways by neighboring them and residing amongst them. 

Fear Allaah and adhere to the Sunnah."

"This lying idiot either is too ignorant of the Arabic language to know that the Sheikh didn't say what he attributed to him or he is purposely misleading the people by doing his usual 8 to 5 job as a habitual liar. 
Actually, his wife should be able to assist him so he really doesn't have an excuse. 
I'm glad he's digging a bigger hole for himself. 
It won't be long before he announces that he has accepted Jesus as Lord and savior. Or something along those lines.
You might think that's a reach. Nah, no one plays with the Deen of Allaah and slanders the Salafi scholars except that he goes far astray. 
Time will tell inshaaAllaah. 
Bookmark this post for that day."

"Eli Sham became Jabbar Shamsud-din.

Israeli false flags are becoming really sloppy these days"
